stemHtml:
While in contact with a radar ATS unit, you receive these three messages (call signs omitted). Which set of responses is fully correct?

1. "Advise type of transponder capability"
2. "Check altimeter setting and confirm level"
3. "Turn left immediately heading 050"

options.a: 1. Transponder Sierra, 2. Altimeter 1008 altitude 2000 ft, 3. Left heading 050
options.b: 1. Transponder Charlie, 2. Altimeter 1008 flight level 110, 3. Left immediately 050
options.c: 1. Transponder Alpha, 2. Altimeter 1008 flight level 110, 3. Left immediately 050
options.d: 1. Transponder Bravo, 2. Altimeter 1008 altitude 2000 ft, 3. Left immediately heading 050
